name: Video - Selling Products from Other Outlets
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this video we use POS to show you how you can search for products available in other Outlets, and sell them right from within a transaction."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/79163125?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "700", "height": "400"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/79163125?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "700", "height": "400"}}]
